214	    @objc open func calculateDimensions(labelFont: NSUIFont, viewPortHandler: ViewPortHandler)
215	    {
216	        let maxEntrySize = getMaximumEntrySize(withFont: labelFont)
217	        let defaultFormSize = self.formSize
218	        let stackSpace = self.stackSpace
219	        let formToTextSpace = self.formToTextSpace
220	        let xEntrySpace = self.xEntrySpace
221	        let yEntrySpace = self.yEntrySpace
222	        let wordWrapEnabled = self.wordWrapEnabled
223	        let entries = self.entries
224	        let entryCount = entries.count
225	        
226	        textWidthMax = maxEntrySize.width
227	        textHeightMax = maxEntrySize.height
228	        
229	        switch orientation
230	        {
231	        case .vertical:
232	            
233	            var maxWidth = CGFloat(0.0)
234	            var width = CGFloat(0.0)
235	            var maxHeight = CGFloat(0.0)
236	            let labelLineHeight = labelFont.lineHeight
237	            
238	            var wasStacked = false
239	            
240	            for i in entries.indices
241	            {
242	                let e = entries[i]
243	                let drawingForm = e.form != .none
244	                let formSize = e.formSize.isNaN ? defaultFormSize : e.formSize
245	
246	                if !wasStacked
247	                {
248	                    width = 0.0
249	                }
250	                
251	                if drawingForm
252	                {
253	                    if wasStacked
254	                    {
255	                        width += stackSpace
256	                    }
257	                    width += formSize
258	                }
259	                
260	                if let label = e.label
261	                {
262	                    let size = (label as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: labelFont])
263	
264	                    if drawingForm && !wasStacked
265	                    {
266	                        width += formToTextSpace
267	                    }
268	                    else if wasStacked
269	                    {
270	                        maxWidth = max(maxWidth, width)
271	                        maxHeight += labelLineHeight + yEntrySpace
272	                        width = 0.0
273	                        wasStacked = false
274	                    }
275	                    
276	                    width += size.width
277	                    maxHeight += labelLineHeight + yEntrySpace
278	                }
279	                else
280	                {
281	                    wasStacked = true
282	                    width += formSize
283	                    
284	                    if i < entryCount - 1
285	                    {
286	                        width += stackSpace
287	                    }
288	                }
289	                
290	                maxWidth = max(maxWidth, width)
291	            }
292	            
293	            neededWidth = maxWidth
294	            neededHeight = maxHeight
295	            
296	        case .horizontal:
297	            
298	            let labelLineHeight = labelFont.lineHeight
299	            
300	            let contentWidth: CGFloat = viewPortHandler.contentWidth * maxSizePercent
301	            
302	            // Prepare arrays for calculated layout
303	            if calculatedLabelSizes.count != entryCount
304	            {
305	                calculatedLabelSizes = [CGSize](repeating: CGSize(), count: entryCount)
306	            }
307	            
308	            if calculatedLabelBreakPoints.count != entryCount
309	            {
310	                calculatedLabelBreakPoints = [Bool](repeating: false, count: entryCount)
311	            }
312	            
313	            calculatedLineSizes.removeAll(keepingCapacity: true)
314	            
315	            // Start calculating layout
316	            
317	            var maxLineWidth: CGFloat = 0.0
318	            var currentLineWidth: CGFloat = 0.0
319	            var requiredWidth: CGFloat = 0.0
320	            var stackedStartIndex: Int = -1
321	            
322	            for i in entries.indices
323	            {
324	                let e = entries[i]
325	                let drawingForm = e.form != .none
326	                let label = e.label
327	                
328	                calculatedLabelBreakPoints[i] = false
329	                
330	                if stackedStartIndex == -1
331	                {
332	                    // we are not stacking, so required width is for this label only
333	                    requiredWidth = 0.0
334	                }
335	                else
336	                {
337	                    // add the spacing appropriate for stacked labels/forms
338	                    requiredWidth += stackSpace
339	                }
340	                
341	                // grouped forms have null labels
342	                if let label = label
343	                {
344	                    calculatedLabelSizes[i] = (label as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: labelFont])
345	                    requiredWidth += drawingForm ? formToTextSpace + formSize : 0.0
346	                    requiredWidth += calculatedLabelSizes[i].width
347	                }
348	                else
349	                {
350	                    calculatedLabelSizes[i] = CGSize()
351	                    requiredWidth += drawingForm ? formSize : 0.0
352	                    
353	                    if stackedStartIndex == -1
354	                    {
355	                        // mark this index as we might want to break here later
356	                        stackedStartIndex = i
357	                    }
358	                }
359	                
360	                if label != nil || i == entryCount - 1
361	                {
362	                    let requiredSpacing = currentLineWidth == 0.0 ? 0.0 : xEntrySpace
363	                    
364	                    if (!wordWrapEnabled || // No word wrapping, it must fit.
365	                        currentLineWidth == 0.0 || // The line is empty, it must fit.
366	                        (contentWidth - currentLineWidth >= requiredSpacing + requiredWidth)) // It simply fits
367	                    {
368	                        // Expand current line
369	                        currentLineWidth += requiredSpacing + requiredWidth
370	                    }
371	                    else
372	                    { // It doesn't fit, we need to wrap a line
373	                        
374	                        // Add current line size to array
375	                        calculatedLineSizes.append(CGSize(width: currentLineWidth, height: labelLineHeight))
376	                        maxLineWidth = max(maxLineWidth, currentLineWidth)
377	                        
378	                        // Start a new line
379	                        calculatedLabelBreakPoints[stackedStartIndex > -1 ? stackedStartIndex : i] = true
380	                        currentLineWidth = requiredWidth
381	                    }
382	                    
383	                    if i == entryCount - 1
384	                    { // Add last line size to array
385	                        calculatedLineSizes.append(CGSize(width: currentLineWidth, height: labelLineHeight))
386	                        maxLineWidth = max(maxLineWidth, currentLineWidth)
387	                    }
388	                }
389	                
390	                stackedStartIndex = label != nil ? -1 : stackedStartIndex
391	            }
392	            
393	            neededWidth = maxLineWidth
394	            neededHeight = labelLineHeight * CGFloat(calculatedLineSizes.count) +
395	                yEntrySpace * CGFloat(calculatedLineSizes.isEmpty ? 0 : (calculatedLineSizes.count - 1))
396	        }
397	        
398	        neededWidth += xOffset
399	        neededHeight += yOffset
400	    }
401	    
402	    /// MARK: - Custom legend
403	    
404	    /// Sets a custom legend's entries array.
405	    /// * A nil label will start a group.
406	    /// This will disable the feature that automatically calculates the legend entries from the datasets.
407	    /// Call `resetCustom(...)` to re-enable automatic calculation (and then `notifyDataSetChanged()` is needed).
408	    @objc open func setCustom(entries: [LegendEntry])
409	    {
410	        self.entries = entries
411	        _isLegendCustom = true
412	    }
413	    
414	    /// Calling this will disable the custom legend entries (set by `setLegend(...)`). Instead, the entries will again be calculated automatically (after `notifyDataSetChanged()` is called).
415	    @objc open func resetCustom()
416	    {
417	        _isLegendCustom = false
418	    }
419	    
420	    /// **default**: false (automatic legend)
421	    /// `true` if a custom legend entries has been set
422	    @objc open var isLegendCustom: Bool
423	    {
424	        return _isLegendCustom
425	    }
426	}
